mapper.sql: id::text AS id, title, body, pinned_yn AS "pinnedYn", open_yn AS "openYn", author_id::text AS "authorId", created_at AS "createdAt", created_by::text AS "createdBy", updated_at AS "updatedAt", updated_by::text AS "updatedBy"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notice WHERE open_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY pinned_yn DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, body, pinned_yn, open_yn, author_id, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{body}, #{pinnedYn}, #{openYn}, ${authorId}, ${authorId}, ${authorId}) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE notice
title = #{title}, body = #{body}, pinned_yn = #{pinnedYn}, open_yn = #{openYn}, updated_by = ${updatedBy},
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
